Title: Verify clicking User button opens logout dialog
Preconditions: User is logged into the Washtab application; User is on the Home page
Test Steps:
1. Launch the Washtab application
2. Log in with valid credentials
3. Ensure Home page is displayed
4. Click the User button
Expected Result: A logout confirmation dialog is displayed; Dialog appears on top of the Home page

Title: Verify logout dialog shows correct heading
Preconditions: User is logged in; User is on Home page; Logout dialog is opened
Test Steps:
1. Click the User button on Home page
2. Observe the dialog heading
Expected Result: Dialog heading should be displayed as: Confirm Log Out

Title: Verify logout dialog shows message with logged-in username
Preconditions: User is logged in with a known username; User is on Home page
Test Steps:
1. Note the logged-in username
2. Click the User button
3. Observe the message shown in the logout dialog
Expected Result: Dialog message should display: Log out <Username>; <Username> should match the currently logged-in user

Title: Verify logout dialog contains Yes and No buttons
Preconditions: User is logged in; User is on Home page; Logout dialog is opened
Test Steps:
1. Click the User button
2. Observe the buttons in the dialog
Expected Result: Dialog displays Yes button; Dialog displays No button

Title: Verify clicking No closes the logout dialog
Preconditions: User is logged in; User is on Home page; Logout dialog is opened
Test Steps:
1. Click the User button
2. In the logout dialog, click No
Expected Result: Logout dialog closes; User remains logged in; Home page is displayed

Title: Verify clicking Yes logs out user and redirects to Login page
Preconditions: User is logged in; User is on Home page; Logout dialog is opened
Test Steps:
1. Click the User button
2. In the logout dialog, click Yes
Expected Result: User is logged out successfully; Application navigates to the Login page; Home page is no longer accessible without logging in again

Title: Verify logged-out user cannot continue using Home page without login
Preconditions: User has logged out using Yes button; Login page is displayed
Test Steps:
1. After logout, try navigating back using browser/app back action if applicable
2. Attempt to access Home page
Expected Result: User should remain logged out; Application should show Login page or ask user to log in again; Home page should not be accessible without authentication

Title: Verify dialog behavior when No is clicked versus Yes is clicked
Preconditions: User is logged in; User is on Home page
Test Steps:
1. Click the User button
2. Verify dialog is displayed
3. Click No
4. Reopen the dialog by clicking the User button again
5. Click Yes
Expected Result: On clicking No, dialog closes and Home page remains displayed; On clicking Yes, user is logged out and redirected to Login page

Title: Verify logout dialog is not shown automatically
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the Home page
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application
2. Stay on Home page without clicking User button
Expected Result: Logout dialog should not appear automatically

Title: Verify correct username is shown for different users
Preconditions: Multiple valid users are available for login
Test Steps:
1. Log in as User A
2. Open logout dialog and verify username
3. Log out
4. Log in as User B
5. Open logout dialog and verify username
Expected Result: Each time, the dialog should show the currently logged-in username correctly
